## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Do `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Python: [e.g., 3.10.12]
- Branch: [e.g., feature/issue-6-mediapipe-facemesh]
